title: Node Exporter Code-Gen Quality Bugs
description: The node exporter produces Python code that fails at runtime for several node patterns. Discovered when exporting the Blocker group with split_frames — downstream sub-group failures prevent the main Blocker from building. Five distinct issues identified.
definition-of-done: 1. All five bug classes are fixed. 2. Blocker exports with split_frames and all generated sub-groups build without errors. 3. blender-cli validate shows no errors for the reconstructed Blocker group.
testing-plan: 1. Export Blocker with --split-frames. 2. Copy generated files to geo_node_groups/armor/blocker/. 3. Restart Blender and verify zero errors in terminal. 4. Run blender-cli validate --group Blocker.
todos: DONE : Fix helper return socket treated as node — built node_input_map that maps helper nodes to their .node accessor expression, used in all link emission points.
DONE : Fix float-to-int default_value — added _typed_repr() to cast float→int for INT sockets, and made link_or_set() type-safe for runtime mismatches.
DONE : Fix undefined variable reference — same root cause as bug 1; multi-output helpers (separate_xyz) now use first-used-output.node accessor for input linking.

DONE : Fix NodeGroupInput virtual socket links — collect_frame_descendants now excludes NodeGroupInput/NodeGroupOutput from frame membership, so they remain as unframed nodes and their links become proper boundary interfaces.

DONE : Fix CaptureAttribute virtual socket links — added _emit_dynamic_items() to emit capture_items.new() / repeat_items.new() etc. before any links to dynamic sockets. Also added capture_items/repeat_items/index_switch_items to SKIP_PROPS.
unknowns-resolved: Dynamic-socket node types handled: CaptureAttribute (capture_items), RepeatOutput (repeat_items), SimulationOutput (items), IndexSwitch (index_switch_items). RepeatInput/SimulationInput get items from their paired Output.
Type casting is handled at two layers: _typed_repr in the exporter for generated code, and link_or_set at runtime for edge cases like Compare node name-based socket resolution.
changes-made: exporter.py: Added _typed_repr() for socket-type-aware value repr. Built node_input_map for helper node .node accessor. Updated _emit_interleaved_links, boundary links, and _emit_helper_node to use accessor map. Added _emit_dynamic_items() for CaptureAttribute etc.
frame_split.py: collect_frame_descendants excludes NodeGroupInput/NodeGroupOutput. _emit_interleaved_links and generate_main_code use node_input_map for link targets.
utils.py: Added capture_items, repeat_items, index_switch_items to SKIP_PROPS.
node_helpers.py: Made link_or_set type-safe — casts float→int for INT sockets and int→float for VALUE sockets.
tools/commands/node_tools.py: Added 'promote' CLI command to move tmp exports to permanent locations with import rewriting.
